nasb.text: But if the priest looks at it, and behold, there are no white hairs in it and it is not lower than the skin and is faded, then the priest shall isolate him for seven days;

esv.text: But if the priest examines it and there is no white hair in it and it is not deeper than the skin, but has faded, then the priest shall shut him up seven days.

cnv.text: 但如果祭司察看病情，看見上面沒有白毛，也沒有深透皮膚，只是發暗而已，祭司就要把他隔離七天；

ccb.text: 但祭司检查时，若发现患处没有白毛，没有凹陷，肉色变淡，就要把他隔离七天。
